courses.title: FrontendMasters : Enterprise UI Development
courses.description: Architect large, successful frontend systems! Balance autonomy and complexity as you explore monoliths, microfrontends, and monorepos. Use Turborepo to speed up build times and keep your team productive. Learn CI/CD and testing best practices to ship faster with higher-quality code.

courses.title: FrontendMasters :  AI Agents Fundamentals, v2
courses.description: Create a CLI agent from scratch! Learn the foundations of agent development like tool calling, agent loops, and and evals. Add human-in-the-loop approvals for higher-stakes operations. Monitor token usage and implement advanced for managing the context window.
